Implement the following plan:

# Meetings Page — View & Cancel Bookings

## Context
Users need an internal page to view all their booked meetings, see Google Meet links, and cancel meetings. Currently bookings are only visible in the database — there's no UI for team members to manage them.

## Approach
Add a "Meetings" sidebar item under the **CRM section** (next to Sales, Network, etc.) that shows a table of all bookings for the logged-in user's booking page(s), with the ability to cancel.

## Files to Modify

### 1. `components/Sidebar.tsx` — Add "Meetings" nav item
- Add under CRM section, after "Submissions"
- Icon: `Calendar` from lucide-react
- Path: `/crm/meetings`

### 2. `app/crm/meetings/page.tsx` — NEW page
- Fetch bookings for the current user's booking page(s) via `BookingService`
- Table columns: Date, Time (UTC), Booker Name, Booker Email, Status, Meet Link, Notes, Opportunity
- Status badge: `confirmed` (green) / `cancelled` (red)
- Row actions dropdown: Cancel (with confirmation dialog), Copy Meet Link
- Meet Link column: clickable "Join" button that opens Google Meet
- Filter tabs: Upcoming / Past / Cancelled
- Default sort: upcoming meetings first (by date ascending)

### 3. `lib/bookingService.ts` — Add methods
- `getMyBookings()` — fetch all bookings for the current user's booking page(s), joined with booking_pages and optionally crm_opportunities for the opportunity name
- Update `Booking` interface to include `meet_link`, `google_event_id`, `confirmation_sent`

## UI Pattern
Follow the existing CRM page patterns:
- Loading skeleton while fetching
- Empty state when no bookings
- `useToast()` for cancel confirmation feedback
- Dialog for cancel confirmation ("Are you sure?")
- Tab filters using simple button group (Upcoming / Past / Cancelled)

## Verification
1. Sidebar shows "Meetings" under CRM
2. Page loads and shows bookings in a table
3. Cancel button opens confirmation dialog, sets status to `cancelled`
4. Meet link buttons open Google Meet in new tab
5. Tabs filter correctly between upcoming/past/cancelled


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/andylee/.claude/projects/-Users-andylee-Downloads-KOL-Campaign-Manager/9cee879f-5812-4581-b9a4-cb9ad56c502e.jsonl

   579→        if (open) setChangelogPage(0);
   580→      }}>
   581→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg max-h-[80vh]">

   585→              <DialogTitle className="text-xl">Changelog</DialogTitle>
   586→            </div>
   587→            <DialogDescription>
   588→              Version history and updates
   589→            </DialogDescription>

   591→          <ScrollArea className="max-h-[50vh] pr-4">
   592→            <div className="space-y-6">
   593→              {changelogs
   594→                .slice(changelogPage * changelogsPerPage, (changelogPage + 1) * changelogsPerPage)
   595→                .map((changelog, idx) => (
   596→                <div key={changelog.id} className={idx > 0 ? 'border-t pt-6' : ''}>
   597→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
   598→                    <Badge
   599→                      variant="secondary"
   600→                      className="bg-[#3e8692]/10 text-[#3e8692]"
   601→                    >
   602→                      v{changelog.version}
   603→                    </Badge>
   604→                    {changelog.published_at && (
   605→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   606→                        {formatChangelogDate(changelog.published_at)}
   607→                      </span>
   608→                    )}
   609→                  </div>
   610→                  <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
   611→                    {changelog.title}
   612→                  </h3>
   613→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   614→                    {renderChangelogContent(changelog.content)}
   615→                  </div>
   616→                </div>
   617→              ))}
   618→              {changelogs.length === 0 && (
   619→                <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-4">
   620→                  No changelogs available yet.
   621→                </p>
   622→              )}
   623→            </div>
   624→          </ScrollArea>
   625→          {changelogs.length > changelogsPerPage && (
   626→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-4 border-t">
   627→              <Button
   628→                variant="outline"
   629→                size="sm"
   630→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.max(0, p - 1))}
   631→                disabled={changelogPage === 0}
   632→              >
   633→                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
   634→                Previous
   635→              </Button>
   636→              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   637→                Page {changelogPage + 1} of {Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage)}
   638→              </span>
   639→              <Button
   640→                variant="outline"
   641→                size="sm"
   642→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.min(Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1, p + 1))}
   643→                disabled={changelogPage >= Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1}
   644→              >
   645→                Next
   646→                <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 ml-1" />
   647→              </Button>
   648→            </div>
   649→          )}
   650→        </DialogContent>
   651→      </Dialog>
   652→    </div>
   653→  );
   654→}

 `./lib/bookingService.ts`

```text
     1→import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
     2→import { supabase } from './supabase';
     3→
     4→const supabaseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!;
     5→const supabaseAnonKey = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!;
     6→
     7→// Public client for unauthenticated booking pages
     8→export const supabasePublic = createClient(supabaseUrl, supabaseAnonKey);
     9→
    10→// ============================================
    11→// Types
    12→// ============================================
    13→
    14→export interface AvailableSlot {
    15→  day: number; // 0=Sun, 1=Mon, ..., 6=Sat
    16→  start: string; // "HH:MM"
    17→  end: string; // "HH:MM"
    18→}
    19→
    20→export interface BookingPage {
    21→  id: string;
    22→  user_id: string;
    23→  slug: string;
    24→  title: string | null;
    25→  description: string | null;
    26→  slot_duration_minutes: number;
    27→  available_slots: AvailableSlot[];
    28→  is_active: boolean;
    29→  created_at: string;
    30→  updated_at: string;
    31→  user?: {
    32→    name: string;
    33→    email: string;
    34→    profile_photo_url: string | null;
    35→  };
    36→}
    37→
    38→export interface Booking {
    39→  id: string;
    40→  booking_page_id: string;
    41→  opportunity_id: string | null;
    42→  booker_name: string;
    43→  booker_email: string;
    44→  meeting_date: string; // YYYY-MM-DD
    45→  start_time: string; // HH:MM:SS
    46→  end_time: string; // HH:MM:SS
    47→  status: 'confirmed' | 'cancelled';
    48→  notes: string | null;
    49→  created_at: string;
    50→}
    51→
    52→export interface CreateBookingData {
    53→  booking_page_id: string;
    54→  opportunity_id?: string | null;
    55→  booker_name: string;
    56→  booker_email: string;
    57→  meeting_date: string;
    58→  start_time: string;
    59→  end_time: string;
    60→  notes?: string;
    61→}
    62→
    63→export interface TimeSlot {
    64→  start: string; // "HH:MM"
    65→  end: string; // "HH:MM"
    66→  booked?: boolean;
    67→}
    68→
    69→// ============================================
    70→// Booking Service
    71→// ============================================
    72→
    73→export class BookingService {
    74→  /**
    75→   * Fetch a booking page by slug (public, no auth needed)
    76→   */
    77→  static async getBookingPageBySlug(slug: string): Promise<BookingPage | null> {
    78→    const { data, error } = await supabasePublic
    79→      .from('booking_pages')
    80→      .select(`
    81→        *,
    82→        user:users!booking_pages_user_id_fkey(name, email, profile_photo_url)
    83→      `)
    84→      .eq('slug', slug)
    85→      .eq('is_active', true)
    86→      .single();
    87→
    88→    if (error) {
    89→      if (error.code === 'PGRST116') return null; // Not found
    90→      console.error('Error fetching booking page:', error);
    91→      return null;
    92→    }
    93→
    94→    return data as BookingPage;
    95→  }
    96→
    97→  /**
    98→   * Compute available time slots for a given date.
    99→   * Returns slots from available_slots config minus already-booked slots.
   100→   */
   101→  static async getAvailableSlots(
   102→    bookingPageId: string,
   103→    date: string, // YYYY-MM-DD
   104→    availableSlots: AvailableSlot[],
   105→    slotDurationMinutes: number
   106→  ): Promise<TimeSlot[]> {
   107→    // Get day of week for the date (0=Sun)
   108→    const dateObj = new Date(date + 'T00:00:00Z');
   109→    const dayOfWeek = dateObj.getUTCDay();
   110→
   111→    // Find config slots for this day
   112→    const daySlots = availableSlots.filter(s => s.day === dayOfWeek);
   113→    if (daySlots.length === 0) return [];
   114→
   115→    // Generate all possible slots
   116→    const allSlots: TimeSlot[] = [];
   117→    for (const daySlot of daySlots) {
   118→      const [startH, startM] = daySlot.start.split(':').map(Number);
   119→      const [endH, endM] = daySlot.end.split(':').map(Number);
   120→      const startMinutes = startH * 60 + startM;
   121→      const endMinutes = endH * 60 + endM;
   122→
   123→      for (let m = startMinutes; m + slotDurationMinutes <= endMinutes; m += slotDurationMinutes) {
   124→        const slotStart = `${String(Math.floor(m / 60)).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(m % 60).padStart(2, '0')}`;
   125→        const slotEndM = m + slotDurationMinutes;
   126→        const slotEnd = `${String(Math.floor(slotEndM / 60)).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(slotEndM % 60).padStart(2, '0')}`;
   127→        allSlots.push({ start: slotStart, end: slotEnd });
   128→      }
   129→    }
   130→
   131→    // Fetch existing bookings for this date
   132→    const { data: existingBookings } = await supabasePublic
   133→      .from('bookings')
   134→      .select('start_time, end_time')
   135→      .eq('booking_page_id', bookingPageId)
   136→      .eq('meeting_date', date)
   137→      .eq('status', 'confirmed');
   138→
   139→    if (!existingBookings || existingBookings.length === 0) return allSlots;
   140→
   141→    // Mark booked slots
   142→    const bookedTimes = new Set(
   143→      existingBookings.map(b => b.start_time.substring(0, 5)) // "HH:MM"
   144→    );
   145→
   146→    return allSlots.map(slot => ({
   147→      ...slot,
   148→      booked: bookedTimes.has(slot.start),
   149→    }));
   150→  }
   151→
   152→  /**
   153→   * Create a booking (public, no auth needed).
   154→   * Optionally links to an opportunity and updates its fields.
   155→   */
   156→  static async createBooking(data: CreateBookingData): Promise<Booking> {
   157→    const insertData: any = {
   158→      booking_page_id: data.booking_page_id,
   159→      booker_name: data.booker_name,
   160→      booker_email: data.booker_email,
   161→      meeting_date: data.meeting_date,
   162→      start_time: data.start_time,
   163→      end_time: data.end_time,
   164→      notes: data.notes || null,
   165→      status: 'confirmed',
   166→    };
   167→
   168→    if (data.opportunity_id) {
   169→      insertData.opportunity_id = data.opportunity_id;
   170→    }
   171→
   172→    const { data: booking, error } = await supabasePublic
   173→      .from('bookings')
   174→      .insert([insertData])
   175→      .select()
   176→      .single();
   177→
   178→    if (error) {
   179→      console.error('Error creating booking:', error);
   180→      throw error;
   181→    }
   182→
   183→    // Opportunity update is handled by the database trigger
   184→    // (update_opportunity_on_booking) which runs as SECURITY DEFINER
   185→    // and bypasses RLS to set next_meeting_at, calendly_booked_date,
   186→    // next_meeting_type, and auto-advance stage if in outreach.
   187→
   188→    return booking as Booking;
   189→  }
   190→
   191→  /**
   192→   * Get bookings for a page within a date range (authenticated)
   193→   */
   194→  static async getBookingsByPage(
   195→    bookingPageId: string,
   196→    startDate?: string,
   197→    endDate?: string
   198→  ): Promise<Booking[]> {
   199→    let query = supabase
   200→      .from('bookings')
   201→      .select('*')
   202→      .eq('booking_page_id', bookingPageId)
   203→      .order('meeting_date', { ascending: true })
   204→      .order('start_time', { ascending: true });
   205→
   206→    if (startDate) query = query.gte('meeting_date', startDate);
   207→    if (endDate) query = query.lte('meeting_date', endDate);
   208→
   209→    const { data, error } = await query;
   210→    if (error) throw error;
   211→    return (data || []) as Booking[];
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  /**
   215→   * Get the current user's booking page (authenticated)
   216→   */
   217→  static async getMyBookingPage(): Promise<BookingPage | null> {
   218→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   219→    if (!user) return null;
   220→
   221→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   222→      .from('booking_pages')
   223→      .select('*')
   224→      .eq('user_id', user.id)
   225→      .single();
   226→
   227→    if (error) {
   228→      if (error.code === 'PGRST116') return null;
   229→      throw error;
   230→    }
   231→    return data as BookingPage;
   232→  }
   233→
   234→  /**
   235→   * Update a booking page (authenticated, owner only)
   236→   */
   237→  static async updateBookingPage(
   238→    id: string,
   239→    updates: Partial<Pick<BookingPage, 'title' | 'description' | 'slug' | 'slot_duration_minutes' | 'available_slots' | 'is_active'>>
   240→  ): Promise<BookingPage> {
   241→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   242→      .from('booking_pages')
   243→      .update({ ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   244→      .eq('id', id)
   245→      .select()
   246→      .single();
   247→
   248→    if (error) throw error;
   249→    return data as BookingPage;
   250→  }
   251→
   252→  /**
   253→   * Cancel a booking (set status to cancelled)
   254→   */
   255→  static async cancelBooking(id: string): Promise<Booking> {
   256→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   257→      .from('bookings')
   258→      .update({ status: 'cancelled' })
   259→      .eq('id', id)
   260→      .select()
   261→      .single();
   262→
   263→    if (error) throw error;
   264→    return data as Booking;
   265→  }
   266→
   267→  /**
   268→   * Get booking page by user_id (for generating booking links in pipeline)
   269→   */
   270→  static async getBookingPageByUserId(userId: string): Promise<BookingPage | null> {
   271→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   272→      .from('booking_pages')
   273→      .select('*')
   274→      .eq('user_id', userId)
   275→      .single();
   276→
   277→    if (error) {
   278→      if (error.code === 'PGRST116') return null;
   279→      return null;
   280→    }
   281→    return data as BookingPage;
   282→  }
   283→}
   284→

```text
## Summary of Patterns in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/submissions/page.tsx`

### **Imports**
- Uses 'use client' for client-side component
- Imports React hooks: `useState`, `useEffect`, `useMemo`
- UI components from `@/components/ui/`: Card, Badge, Input, Table (TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow), Skeleton, Dialog (DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle), Button
- Icons from `lucide-react` (Search, Inbox, Clock, DollarSign, User, Mail, MessageSquare, Target, Calendar, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ExternalLink)
- Supabase client and useToast hook for notifications

### **Loading Skeleton Pattern**
- Returns skeleton structure during loading state with multiple `<Skeleton>` components
- Includes header skeleton (h-8, h-4), 3 stat card skeletons (h-24), search input skeleton (h-10), and table skeleton (h-96)
- Provides visual placeholder matching the actual UI layout

### **Empty State Pattern**
- Conditional rendering in TableBody: displays message in a single row spanning all columns (colSpan={8})
- Two messages: "No submissions match your search" (when filtered) or "No submissions yet" (when empty)
- Centered text with gray styling (py-12 text-gray-400)

### **Table Structure**
- 8 columns: Date, Name, Project, Role, Email, Telegram, Funding, Timeline
- Clickable header cells with sort functionality for 'created_at', 'name', 'project_name'
- Dynamic sort icons (ChevronUp/ChevronDown) appear next to active sort field
- Each row is clickable and opens detail dialog
- Email cells are links (prevent propagation with stopPropagation)
- Funding and Timeline use colored Badge components based on content

### **useToast Usage**
- Initialized with `const { toast } = useToast();`
- Called once in error handling during data fetch with: title, description, and destructive variant
- Pattern: `toast({ title: 'Error', description: '...', variant: 'destructive' })`

### **Dialog Pattern**
- Uses `Dialog` component with `DialogContent`, `DialogHeader`, `DialogTitle`
- Controlled by `selectedSubmission` state (opens when selection exists)
- onOpenChange handler closes dialog by clearing selection
- Contains detailed submission info in grid layout with 2 columns
- Displays goals in a read-only gray box
- Footer shows submission timestamp
- Title includes User icon with custom color (#3e8692)

### **Additional Patterns**
- **Stats calculation**: useMemo to compute total submissions and this week's count
- **Color functions**: Helper functions for conditional Badge colors based on funding/timeline values
- **Date formatting**: Separate functions for date and time formatting
- **Search/Filter**: Real-time search across name, project_name, email, telegram, and role fields
- **Sort state**: Maintains sortField and sortDir, toggles direction when clicking same field

     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
     4→import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
     5→import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
     6→import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
     7→import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table';
     8→import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
     9→import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
    10→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
    11→import {
    12→  Search, Inbox, Clock, DollarSign, User, Mail, MessageSquare,
    13→  Target, Calendar, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ExternalLink
    14→} from 'lucide-react';
    15→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
    16→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
    17→
    18→interface ContactSubmission {
    19→  id: number;
    20→  name: string;
    21→  project_name: string;
    22→  email: string;
    23→  role: string;
    24→  telegram: string;
    25→  funding: string;
    26→  timeline: string;
    27→  goals: string;
    28→  created_at: string;
    29→}
    30→
    31→export default function SubmissionsPage() {
    32→  const { toast } = useToast();
    33→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    34→  const [submissions, setSubmissions] = useState<ContactSubmission[]>([]);
    35→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
    36→  const [selectedSubmission, setSelectedSubmission] = useState<ContactSubmission | null>(null);
    37→  const [sortField, setSortField] = useState<'created_at' | 'name' | 'project_name'>('created_at');
    38→  const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState<'asc' | 'desc'>('desc');
    39→
    40→  useEffect(() => {
    41→    fetchSubmissions();
    42→  }, []);
    43→
    44→  const fetchSubmissions = async () => {
    45→    setLoading(true);
    46→    try {
    47→      const { data, error } = await supabase
    48→        .from('contact_submissions')
    49→        .select('*')
    50→        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    51→
    52→      if (error) throw error;
    53→      setSubmissions(data || []);
    54→    } catch (error) {
    55→      console.error('Error fetching submissions:', error);
    56→      toast({
    57→        title: 'Error',
    58→        description: 'Failed to load submissions',
    59→        variant: 'destructive',
    60→      });
    61→    } finally {
    62→      setLoading(false);
    63→    }
    64→  };
    65→
    66→  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    67→    let items = submissions;
    68→    if (searchTerm) {
    69→      const term = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
    70→      items = items.filter(s =>
    71→        s.name?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
    72→        s.project_name?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
    73→        s.email?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
    74→        s.telegram?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
    75→        s.role?.toLowerCase().includes(term)
    76→      );
    77→    }
    78→    return [...items].sort((a, b) => {
    79→      const aVal = a[sortField] || '';
    80→      const bVal = b[sortField] || '';
    81→      const cmp = String(aVal).localeCompare(String(bVal));
    82→      return sortDir === 'asc' ? cmp : -cmp;
    83→    });
    84→  }, [submissions, searchTerm, sortField, sortDir]);
    85→
    86→  const handleSort = (field: typeof sortField) => {
    87→    if (sortField === field) {
    88→      setSortDir(d => d === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc');
    89→    } else {
    90→      setSortField(field);
    91→      setSortDir('desc');
    92→    }
    93→  };
    94→
    95→  const SortIcon = ({ field }: { field: typeof sortField }) => {
    96→    if (sortField !== field) return null;
    97→    return sortDir === 'asc'
    98→      ? <ChevronUp className="h-3 w-3 inline ml-1" />
    99→      : <ChevronDown className="h-3 w-3 inline ml-1" />;
   100→  };
   101→
   102→  const formatDate = (dateStr: string) => {
   103→    const d = new Date(dateStr);
   104→    return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
   105→  };
   106→
   107→  const formatTime = (dateStr: string) => {
   108→    const d = new Date(dateStr);
   109→    return d.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' });
   110→  };
   111→
   112→  const timelineColor = (timeline: string) => {
   113→    if (timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('asap') || timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('immediately')) return 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 border-red-200';
   114→    if (timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('soon') || timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('1-2')) return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200';
   115→    if (timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('3-6') || timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('quarter')) return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-200';
   116→    return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-gray-200';
   117→  };
   118→
   119→  const fundingColor = (funding: string) => {
   120→    if (funding?.includes('10M') || funding?.includes('50M') || funding?.includes('100M')) return 'bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200';
   121→    if (funding?.includes('2M') || funding?.includes('5M')) return 'bg-teal-100 text-teal-700 border-teal-200';
   122→    if (funding?.includes('500K') || funding?.includes('1M')) return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-200';
   123→    return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-gray-200';
   124→  };
   125→
   126→  // Stats
   127→  const stats = useMemo(() => {
   128→    const now = new Date();
   129→    const weekAgo = new Date(now.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);

   131→    return { total: submissions.length, thisWeek };

   140→            <Skeleton className="h-4 w-48" />
   141→          </div>
   142→        </div>
   143→        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   144→          <Skeleton className="h-24" />
   145→          <Skeleton className="h-24" />
   146→          <Skeleton className="h-24" />
   147→        </div>
   148→        <Skeleton className="h-10 w-80" />
   149→        <Skeleton className="h-96" />
   150→      </div>
   151→    );
   152→  }
   153→
   154→  return (
   155→    <div className="space-y-6">
   156→      {/* Header */}
   157→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   158→        <div>
   159→          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Contact Submissions</h2>
   160→          <p className="text-gray-600">Inbound inquiries from the contact form</p>
   161→        </div>
   162→      </div>
   163→
   164→      {/* Stats Cards */}
   165→      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   166→        <Card>
   167→          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-4 px-5">
   168→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
   169→              <Inbox className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   170→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Total</p>
   171→            </div>
   172→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{stats.total}</p>
   173→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">All submissions</p>
   174→          </CardContent>
   175→        </Card>
   176→        <Card>
   177→          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-4 px-5">
   178→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
   179→              <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-400" />
   180→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-blue-400">This Week</p>
   181→            </div>
   182→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-700">{stats.thisWeek}</p>
   183→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">Last 7 days</p>
   184→          </CardContent>
   185→        </Card>
   186→        <Card>
   187→          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-4 px-5">
   188→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
   189→              <Calendar className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   190→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Latest</p>
   191→            </div>
   192→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">
   193→              {submissions.length > 0 ? formatDate(submissions[0].created_at) : '—'}

   200→      {/* Search */}

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-06 09:29:06Z)**_

## Summary of Patterns in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/submissions/page.tsx`

### **Imports**
- Uses 'use client' for client-side component
- Imports React hooks: `useState`, `useEffect`, `useMemo`
- UI components from `@/components/ui/`: Card, Badge, Input, Table (TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow), Skeleton, Dialog (DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle), Button
- Icons from `lucide-react` (Search, Inbox, Clock, DollarSign, User, Mail, MessageSquare, Target, Calendar, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ExternalLink)
- Supabase client and useToast hook for notifications

### **Loading Skeleton Pattern**
- Returns skeleton structure during loading state with multiple `<Skeleton>` components
- Includes header skeleton (h-8, h-4), 3 stat card skeletons (h-24), search input skeleton (h-10), and table skeleton (h-96)
- Provides visual placeholder matching the actual UI layout

### **Empty State Pattern**
- Conditional rendering in TableBody: displays message in a single row spanning all columns (colSpan={8})
- Two messages: "No submissions match your search" (when filtered) or "No submissions yet" (when empty)
- Centered text with gray styling (py-12 text-gray-400)

### **Table Structure**
- 8 columns: Date, Name, Project, Role, Email, Telegram, Funding, Timeline
- Clickable header cells with sort functionality for 'created_at', 'name', 'project_name'
- Dynamic sort icons (ChevronUp/ChevronDown) appear next to active sort field
- Each row is clickable and opens detail dialog
- Email cells are links (prevent propagation with stopPropagation)
- Funding and Timeline use colored Badge components based on content

### **useToast Usage**
- Initialized with `const { toast } = useToast();`
- Called once in error handling during data fetch with: title, description, and destructive variant
- Pattern: `toast({ title: 'Error', description: '...', variant: 'destructive' })`

### **Dialog Pattern**
- Uses `Dialog` component with `DialogContent`, `DialogHeader`, `DialogTitle`
- Controlled by `selectedSubmission` state (opens when selection exists)
- onOpenChange handler closes dialog by clearing selection
- Contains detailed submission info in grid layout with 2 columns
- Displays goals in a read-only gray box
- Footer shows submission timestamp
- Title includes User icon with custom color (#3e8692)

### **Additional Patterns**
- **Stats calculation**: useMemo to compute total submissions and this week's count
- **Color functions**: Helper functions for conditional Badge colors based on funding/timeline values
- **Date formatting**: Separate functions for date and time formatting
- **Search/Filter**: Real-time search across name, project_name, email, telegram, and role fields
- **Sort state**: Maintains sortField and sortDir, toggles direction when clicking same field

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
import {
  Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow,
} from '@/components/ui/table';
import {
  Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter,
} from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import {
  DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';
import { Calendar, Video, MoreHorizontal, XCircle, Copy, ExternalLink } from 'lucide-react';
import { BookingService, Booking } from '@/lib/bookingService';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';

type TabFilter = 'upcoming' | 'past' | 'cancelled';

export default function MeetingsPage() {
  const [bookings, setBookings] = useState<Booking[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabFilter>('upcoming');
  const [cancelTarget, setCancelTarget] = useState<Booking | null>(null);
  const [cancelling, setCancelling] = useState(false);
  const { toast } = useToast();

  useEffect(() => {
    loadBookings();
  }, []);

  async function loadBookings() {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const data = await BookingService.getMyBookings();
      setBookings(data);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error loading bookings:', err);
      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to load bookings.', variant: 'destructive' });
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);

  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    return bookings.filter((b) => {
      if (activeTab === 'cancelled') return b.status === 'cancelled';
      if (activeTab === 'upcoming') return b.status === 'confirmed' && b.meeting_date >= today;
      if (activeTab === 'past') return b.status === 'confirmed' && b.meeting_date < today;
      return true;
    });
  }, [bookings, activeTab, today]);

  async function handleCancel() {
    if (!cancelTarget) return;
    setCancelling(true);
    try {
      await BookingService.cancelBooking(cancelTarget.id);
      setBookings((prev) =>
        prev.map((b) => (b.id === cancelTarget.id ? { ...b, status: 'cancelled' as const } : b))
      );
      toast({ title: 'Meeting cancelled', description: `Cancelled meeting with ${cancelTarget.booker_name}.` });
    } catch {
      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to cancel meeting.', variant: 'destructive' });
    } finally {
      setCancelling(false);
      setCancelTarget(null);
    }
  }

  function copyMeetLink(link: string) {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(link);
    toast({ title: 'Copied', description: 'Meet link copied to clipboard.' });
  }

  function formatDate(dateStr: string) {
    const d = new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00');
    return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'short', month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
  }

  function formatTime(time: string) {
    // time is "HH:MM:SS" or "HH:MM"
    const [h, m] = time.split(':').map(Number);
    const suffix = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
    const h12 = h % 12 || 12;
    return `${h12}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${suffix}`;
  }

  const tabs: { key: TabFilter; label: string; count: number }[] = [
    { key: 'upcoming', label: 'Upcoming', count: bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'confirmed' && b.meeting_date >= today).length },
    { key: 'past', label: 'Past', count: bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'confirmed' && b.meeting_date < today).length },
    { key: 'cancelled', label: 'Cancelled', count: bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'cancelled').length },
  ];

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="space-y-6">
        <Skeleton className="h-8 w-48" />
        <Skeleton className="h-4 w-72" />
        <div className="flex gap-2">
          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-28" />
          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-28" />
          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-28" />
        </div>
        <Skeleton className="h-96 w-full" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div>
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Calendar className="h-6 w-6 text-[#3e8692]" />
          Meetings
        </h1>
        <p className="text-gray-500 mt-1">View and manage your booked meetings.</p>
      </div>

      {/* Tab Filters */}
      <div className="flex gap-2">
        {tabs.map((tab) => (
          <Button
            key={tab.key}
            variant={activeTab === tab.key ? 'default' : 'outline'}
            size="sm"
            onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.key)}
            style={activeTab === tab.key ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
          >
            {tab.label}
            <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-2 text-xs">
              {tab.count}
            </Badge>
          </Button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Table */}
      <Card>
        <CardContent className="p-0">
          <Table>
            <TableHeader>
              <TableRow>
                <TableHead>Date</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Time</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Booker Name</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Booker Email</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Meet Link</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Notes</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Opportunity</TableHead>
                <TableHead className="w-10"></TableHead>
              </TableRow>
            </TableHeader>
            <TableBody>
              {filtered.length === 0 ? (
                <TableRow>
                  <TableCell colSpan={9} className="text-center py-12 text-gray-400">
                    {activeTab === 'upcoming'
                      ? 'No upcoming meetings.'
                      : activeTab === 'past'
                      ? 'No past meetings.'
                      : 'No cancelled meetings.'}
                  </TableCell>
                </TableRow>
              ) : (
                filtered.map((booking) => (
                  <TableRow key={booking.id}>
                    <TableCell className="whitespace-nowrap">{formatDate(booking.meeting_date)}</TableCell>
                    <TableCell className="whitespace-nowrap">
                      {formatTime(booking.start_time)} – {formatTime(booking.end_time)}
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell className="font-medium">{booking.booker_name}</TableCell>
                    <TableCell>
                      <a href={`mailto:${booking.booker_email}`} className="text-blue-600 hover:underline">
                        {booking.booker_email}
                      </a>
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell>
                      <Badge
                        variant={booking.status === 'confirmed' ? 'default' : 'destructive'}
                        className={
                          booking.status === 'confirmed'
                            ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800 hover:bg-green-100'
                            : ''
                        }
                      >
                        {booking.status}
                      </Badge>
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell>
                      {booking.meet_link ? (
                        <Button
                          variant="outline"
                          size="sm"
                          className="gap-1"
                          onClick={() => window.open(booking.meet_link!, '_blank')}
                        >
                          <Video className="h-3 w-3" />
                          Join
                        </Button>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-gray-400 text-sm">—</span>
                      )}
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell className="max-w-[200px] truncate" title={booking.notes || ''}>
                      {booking.notes || <span className="text-gray-400">—</span>}
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell>
                      {booking.opportunity?.company_name ? (
                        <span className="text-sm">{booking.opportunity.company_name}</span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-gray-400 text-sm">—</span>
                      )}
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell>
                      <DropdownMenu>
                        <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
                          <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
                            <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
                          </Button>
                        </DropdownMenuTrigger>
                        <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
                          {booking.meet_link && (
                            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => copyMeetLink(booking.meet_link!)}>
                              <Copy className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                              Copy Meet Link
                            </DropdownMenuItem>
                          )}
                          {booking.status === 'confirmed' && (
                            <DropdownMenuItem
                              onClick={() => setCancelTarget(booking)}
                              className="text-red-600 focus:text-red-600"
                            >
                              <XCircle className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                              Cancel Meeting
                            </DropdownMenuItem>
                          )}
                        </DropdownMenuContent>
                      </DropdownMenu>
                    </TableCell>
                  </TableRow>
                ))
              )}
            </TableBody>
          </Table>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Cancel Confirmation Dialog */}
      <Dialog open={!!cancelTarget} onOpenChange={(open) => !open && setCancelTarget(null)}>
        <DialogContent>
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Cancel Meeting</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>
              Are you sure you want to cancel the meeting with{' '}
              <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">{cancelTarget?.booker_name}</span> on{' '}
              <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">
                {cancelTarget ? formatDate(cancelTarget.meeting_date) : ''}
              </span>
              ? This action cannot be undone.
            </DialogDescription>
          </DialogHeader>
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setCancelTarget(null)} disabled={cancelling}>
              Keep Meeting
            </Button>
            <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handleCancel} disabled={cancelling}>
              {cancelling ? 'Cancelling...' : 'Cancel Meeting'}
            </Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </div>
  );
}

```

Perfect! Now I have a complete understanding of the layout structure. Let me compile the findings:

## CRM Pages Layout Structure Summary

### 1. Root Layout (`app/layout.tsx`)
The root layout wraps the entire application with:
- **AuthProvider** - Provides authentication context
- **ChangelogProvider** - Manages changelog data
- **ChunkErrorHandler** - Handles chunk loading errors
- **Toaster** - UI toast notifications

```tsx
export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  return (
    <html lang="en">
      <body className={inter.className}>
        <ChunkErrorHandler />
        <AuthProvider>
          <ChangelogProvider>
            {children}
            <ChangelogModal />
          </ChangelogProvider>
        </AuthProvider>
        <Toaster />
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}
```

### 2. CRM Sub-Route Layouts
All CRM section layouts follow an identical pattern. These files exist:
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/submissions/layout.tsx`
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/network/layout.tsx`
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/pipeline/layout.tsx`
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/contacts/layout.tsx`
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/telegram/layout.tsx`
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/layout.tsx`

**Standard Pattern:**
```tsx
import { ProtectedRoute } from '@/components/auth/ProtectedRoute';
import Sidebar from '@/components/Sidebar';

export default function [SectionName]Layout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <ProtectedRoute>
      <Sidebar>{children}</Sidebar>
    </ProtectedRoute>
  );
}
```

### 3. Authentication Wrapper Pattern

**ProtectedRoute Component** (`/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/components/auth/ProtectedRoute.tsx`):
- Client component that checks authentication status via `useAuth()` hook
- Redirects unauthenticated users to `/auth` page
- Supports optional role-based access control via `requiredRoles` prop
- Shows loading spinner while checking auth status
- Shows "Pending Approval" screen for inactive users
- Only renders children if user is authenticated and has required role

### 4. Sidebar Component
**Location:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/components/Sidebar.tsx`
- Client component that wraps page content
- Provides navigation sidebar with collapsible state (stored in localStorage)
- Integrates changelog modal
- Shows user profile avatar and dropdown menu
- Renders children content next to/after the sidebar

### 5. CRM Page Structure (Example from `app/crm/submissions/page.tsx`)

**First 30 lines:**
```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table';
import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import {
  Search, Inbox, Clock, DollarSign, User, Mail, MessageSquare,
  Target, Calendar, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ExternalLink
} from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';

interface ContactSubmission {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  project_name: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  telegram: string;
  funding: string;
  timeline: string;
  goals: string;
  created_at: string;
}
```

### Key Layout Composition Stack
```
RootLayout (auth, changelog, error handling)
  └─ ProtectedRoute (authentication check + approval blocking)
      └─ Sidebar (navigation + layout wrapper)
          └─ [PageContent] (use client, interactive components)
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./components/auth/ProtectedRoute.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     4→import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
     5→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext'
     6→import { LogOut, Clock } from 'lucide-react'
     7→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
     8→
     9→interface ProtectedRouteProps {
    10→  children: React.ReactNode
    11→  requiredRoles?: string[]
    12→}
    13→
    14→export function ProtectedRoute({ children, requiredRoles }: ProtectedRouteProps) {
    15→  const { user, userProfile, loading, signOut } = useAuth()
    16→  const router = useRouter()
    17→
    18→  useEffect(() => {
    19→    if (!loading && !user) {
    20→      router.push('/auth')
    21→    }
    22→  }, [user, loading, router])
    23→
    24→  // Check role-based access after loading completes
    25→  useEffect(() => {
    26→    if (!loading && user && userProfile && requiredRoles && requiredRoles.length > 0) {
    27→      if (!requiredRoles.includes(userProfile.role)) {
    28→        router.push('/') // Redirect to home if role not allowed
    29→      }

Perfect! Now I have a complete understanding of the layout structure. Let me compile the findings:

## CRM Pages Layout Structure Summary

### 1. Root Layout (`app/layout.tsx`)
The root layout wraps the entire application with:
- **AuthProvider** - Provides authentication context
- **ChangelogProvider** - Manages changelog data
- **ChunkErrorHandler** - Handles chunk loading errors
- **Toaster** - UI toast notifications

```tsx
export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  return (
    <html lang="en">
      <body className={inter.className}>
        <ChunkErrorHandler />
        <AuthProvider>
          <ChangelogProvider>
            {children}
            <ChangelogModal />
          </ChangelogProvider>
        </AuthProvider>
        <Toaster />
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}
```

### 2. CRM Sub-Route Layouts
All CRM section layouts follow an identical pattern. These files exist:
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/submissions/layout.tsx`
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/network/layout.tsx`
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/pipeline/layout.tsx`
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/contacts/layout.tsx`
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/telegram/layout.tsx`
- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/layout.tsx`

**Standard Pattern:**
```tsx
import { ProtectedRoute } from '@/components/auth/ProtectedRoute';
import Sidebar from '@/components/Sidebar';

export default function [SectionName]Layout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <ProtectedRoute>
      <Sidebar>{children}</Sidebar>
    </ProtectedRoute>
  );
}
```

### 3. Authentication Wrapper Pattern

**ProtectedRoute Component** (`/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/components/auth/ProtectedRoute.tsx`):
- Client component that checks authentication status via `useAuth()` hook
- Redirects unauthenticated users to `/auth` page
- Supports optional role-based access control via `requiredRoles` prop
- Shows loading spinner while checking auth status
- Shows "Pending Approval" screen for inactive users
- Only renders children if user is authenticated and has required role

### 4. Sidebar Component
**Location:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/components/Sidebar.tsx`
- Client component that wraps page content
- Provides navigation sidebar with collapsible state (stored in localStorage)
- Integrates changelog modal
- Shows user profile avatar and dropdown menu
- Renders children content next to/after the sidebar

### 5. CRM Page Structure (Example from `app/crm/submissions/page.tsx`)

**First 30 lines:**
```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table';
import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import {
  Search, Inbox, Clock, DollarSign, User, Mail, MessageSquare,
  Target, Calendar, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ExternalLink
} from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';

interface ContactSubmission {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  project_name: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  telegram: string;
  funding: string;
  timeline: string;
  goals: string;
  created_at: string;
}
```

### Key Layout Composition Stack
```
RootLayout (auth, changelog, error handling)
  └─ ProtectedRoute (authentication check + approval blocking)
      └─ Sidebar (navigation + layout wrapper)
          └─ [PageContent] (use client, interactive components)
```

### 1. **Existing Calendar Components**

**YES - A shadcn Calendar component exists:**
- **File**: `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/components/ui/calendar.tsx`

**Content:**
```typescript
'use client';

import * as React from 'react';
import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { DayPicker } from 'react-day-picker';

import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { buttonVariants } from '@/components/ui/button';

export type CalendarProps = React.ComponentProps<typeof DayPicker>;

function Calendar({
  className,
  classNames,
  showOutsideDays = true,
  ...props
}: CalendarProps) {
  return (
    <DayPicker
      showOutsideDays={showOutsideDays}
      className={cn('p-3', className)}
      classNames={{
        months: 'flex flex-col sm:flex-row space-y-4 sm:space-x-4 sm:space-y-0',
        month: 'space-y-4',
        caption: 'flex justify-center pt-1 relative items-center',
        caption_label: 'text-sm font-medium',
        nav: 'space-x-1 flex items-center',
        nav_button: cn(
          buttonVariants({ variant: 'outline' }),
          'h-7 w-7 bg-transparent p-0 opacity-50 hover:opacity-100'
        ),
        nav_button_previous: 'absolute left-1',
        nav_button_next: 'absolute right-1',
        table: 'w-full border-collapse space-y-1',
        head_row: 'flex',
        head_cell:
          'text-muted-foreground rounded-md w-9 font-normal text-[0.8rem]',
        row: 'flex w-full mt-2',
        cell: 'h-9 w-9 text-center text-sm p-0 relative [&:has([aria-selected].day-range-end)]:rounded-r-md [&:has([aria-selected].day-outside)]:bg-accent/50 [&:has([aria-selected])]:bg-accent first:[&:has([aria-selected])]:rounded-l-md last:[&:has([aria-selected])]:rounded-r-md focus-within:relative focus-within:z-20',
        day: cn(
          buttonVariants({ variant: 'ghost' }),
          'h-9 w-9 p-0 font-normal aria-selected:opacity-100'
        ),
        day_range_end: 'day-range-end',
        day_selected:
          'bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground focus:bg-primary focus:text-primary-foreground',
        day_today: 'bg-accent text-accent-foreground',
        day_outside:
          'day-outside text-muted-foreground opacity-50 aria-selected:bg-accent/50 aria-selected:text-muted-foreground aria-selected:opacity-30',
        day_disabled: 'text-muted-foreground opacity-50',
        day_range_middle:
          'aria-selected:bg-accent aria-selected:text-accent-foreground',
        day_hidden: 'invisible',
        ...classNames,
      }}
      components={{
        IconLeft: ({ ...props }) => <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" />,
        IconRight: ({ ...props }) => <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4" />,
      }}
      {...props}
    />
  );
}
Calendar.displayName = 'Calendar';

export { Calendar };
```

---

### 2. **Calendar-Related Dependencies in package.json**

The project has the following relevant dependencies for calendar functionality:

- **`react-day-picker`**: `^8.10.1` - Used as the underlying calendar component
- **`date-fns`**: `^3.6.0` - For date manipulation and formatting
- **`@radix-ui/react-popover`**: `^1.1.1` - For dropdown/popover calendar displays

**Full relevant dependencies section:**
```json
{
  "react-day-picker": "^8.10.1",
  "date-fns": "^3.6.0",
  "@radix-ui/react-popover": "^1.1.1"
}
```

**Note**: There are NO third-party calendar view libraries like `react-big-calendar` or `fullcalendar` currently installed. The project uses only the basic `react-day-picker` component.

### 3. **Current Meetings Page Structure**

**File**: `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/meetings/page.tsx`

  - Date (formatted as "Mon, Mar 06, 2024")
  - Time (formatted as "2:00 PM – 3:00 PM")
  - Booker Name
  - Booker Email
  - Status (confirmed/cancelled badge)
  - Meet Link (with join button)
  - Notes
  - Opportunity/Company

- Uses BookingService to fetch meetings from Supabase
- Loads bookings on component mount
- Real-time state management with toast notifications

**Key Data Structure:**
```typescript
interface Booking {
  id: string;
  booking_page_id: string;
  opportunity_id: string | null;
  booker_name: string;
  booker_email: string;
  meeting_date: string; // YYYY-MM-DD format
  start_time: string; // HH:MM:SS format
  end_time: string; // HH:MM:SS format
  status: 'confirmed' | 'cancelled';
  notes: string | null;
  meet_link: string | null;
  google_event_id: string | null;
  confirmation_sent: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  opportunity?: { name: string | null } | null;
  booking_page?: { title: string | null; slug: string } | null;
}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/crm/meetings/page.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
     4→import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
     5→import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
     6→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     7→import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
     8→import {
     9→  Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow,
    10→} from '@/components/ui/table';
    11→import {
    12→  Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter,
    13→} from '@/components/ui/dialog';
    14→import {
    15→  DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger,
    16→} from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';
    17→import { Calendar, Video, MoreHorizontal, XCircle, Copy, ExternalLink } from 'lucide-react';
    18→import { BookingService, Booking } from '@/lib/bookingService';
    19→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
    20→
    21→type TabFilter = 'upcoming' | 'past' | 'cancelled';
    22→
    23→export default function MeetingsPage() {
    24→  const [bookings, setBookings] = useState<Booking[]>([]);
    25→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    26→  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabFilter>('upcoming');
    27→  const [cancelTarget, setCancelTarget] = useState<Booking | null>(null);
    28→  const [cancelling, setCancelling] = useState(false);
    29→  const { toast } = useToast();
    30→
    31→  useEffect(() => {
    32→    loadBookings();
    33→  }, []);
    34→
    35→  async function loadBookings() {
    36→    try {
    37→      setLoading(true);
    38→      const data = await BookingService.getMyBookings();
    39→      setBookings(data);
    40→    } catch (err) {
    41→      console.error('Error loading bookings:', err);
    42→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to load bookings.', variant: 'destructive' });
    43→    } finally {
    44→      setLoading(false);
    45→    }
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
    49→
    50→  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    51→    return bookings.filter((b) => {
    52→      if (activeTab === 'cancelled') return b.status === 'cancelled';
    53→      if (activeTab === 'upcoming') return b.status === 'confirmed' && b.meeting_date >= today;
    54→      if (activeTab === 'past') return b.status === 'confirmed' && b.meeting_date < today;
    55→      return true;
    56→    });
    57→  }, [bookings, activeTab, today]);
    58→
    59→  async function handleCancel() {
    60→    if (!cancelTarget) return;
    61→    setCancelling(true);
    62→    try {
    63→      await BookingService.cancelBooking(cancelTarget.id);
    64→      setBookings((prev) =>
    65→        prev.map((b) => (b.id === cancelTarget.id ? { ...b, status: 'cancelled' as const } : b))
    66→      );
    67→      toast({ title: 'Meeting cancelled', description: `Cancelled meeting with ${cancelTarget.booker_name}.` });
    68→    } catch {
    69→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to cancel meeting.', variant: 'destructive' });
    70→    } finally {
    71→      setCancelling(false);
    72→      setCancelTarget(null);
    73→    }
    74→  }
    75→
    76→  function copyMeetLink(link: string) {
    77→    navigator.clipboard.writeText(link);
    78→    toast({ title: 'Copied', description: 'Meet link copied to clipboard.' });
    79→  }
    80→
    81→  function formatDate(dateStr: string) {
    82→    const d = new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00');
    83→    return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'short', month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
    84→  }
    85→
    86→  function formatTime(time: string) {
    87→    // time is "HH:MM:SS" or "HH:MM"
    88→    const [h, m] = time.split(':').map(Number);
    89→    const suffix = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
    90→    const h12 = h % 12 || 12;
    91→    return `${h12}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${suffix}`;
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  const tabs: { key: TabFilter; label: string; count: number }[] = [
    95→    { key: 'upcoming', label: 'Upcoming', count: bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'confirmed' && b.meeting_date >= today).length },
    96→    { key: 'past', label: 'Past', count: bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'confirmed' && b.meeting_date < today).length },
    97→    { key: 'cancelled', label: 'Cancelled', count: bookings.filter((b) => b.status === 'cancelled').length },
    98→  ];
    99→
   100→  if (loading) {
   101→    return (
   102→      <div className="space-y-6">
   103→        <Skeleton className="h-8 w-48" />
   104→        <Skeleton className="h-4 w-72" />
   105→        <div className="flex gap-2">
   106→          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-28" />
   107→          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-28" />
   108→          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-28" />
   109→        </div>
   110→        <Skeleton className="h-96 w-full" />
   111→      </div>
   112→    );
   113→  }
   114→
   115→  return (
   116→    <div className="space-y-6">
   117→      {/* Header */}
   118→      <div>
   119→        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2">
   120→          <Calendar className="h-6 w-6 text-[#3e8692]" />
   121→          Meetings
   122→        </h1>
   123→        <p className="text-gray-500 mt-1">View and manage your booked meetings.</p>
   124→      </div>
   125→
   126→      {/* Tab Filters */}
   127→      <div className="flex gap-2">
   128→        {tabs.map((tab) => (
   129→          <Button
   130→            key={tab.key}
   131→            variant={activeTab === tab.key ? 'default' : 'outline'}
   132→            size="sm"
   133→            onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.key)}
   134→            style={activeTab === tab.key ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   135→          >
   136→            {tab.label}
   137→            <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-2 text-xs">
   138→              {tab.count}
   139→            </Badge>
   140→          </Button>
   141→        ))}
   142→      </div>
   143→
   144→      {/* Table */}
   145→      <Card>
   146→        <CardContent className="p-0">
   147→          <Table>
   148→            <TableHeader>
   149→              <TableRow>
   150→                <TableHead>Date</TableHead>
   151→                <TableHead>Time</TableHead>
   152→                <TableHead>Booker Name</TableHead>
   153→                <TableHead>Booker Email</TableHead>
   154→                <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
   155→                <TableHead>Meet Link</TableHead>
   156→                <TableHead>Notes</TableHead>
   157→                <TableHead>Opportunity</TableHead>
   158→                <TableHead className="w-10"></TableHead>
   159→              </TableRow>
   160→            </TableHeader>
   161→            <TableBody>
   162→              {filtered.length === 0 ? (
   163→                <TableRow>
   164→                  <TableCell colSpan={9} className="text-center py-12 text-gray-400">
   165→                    {activeTab === 'upcoming'
   166→                      ? 'No upcoming meetings.'
   167→                      : activeTab === 'past'
   168→                      ? 'No past meetings.'
   169→                      : 'No cancelled meetings.'}
   170→                  </TableCell>
   171→                </TableRow>
   172→              ) : (
   173→                filtered.map((booking) => (
   174→                  <TableRow key={booking.id}>
   175→                    <TableCell className="whitespace-nowrap">{formatDate(booking.meeting_date)}</TableCell>
   176→                    <TableCell className="whitespace-nowrap">
   177→                      {formatTime(booking.start_time)} – {formatTime(booking.end_time)}
   178→                    </TableCell>
   179→                    <TableCell className="font-medium">{booking.booker_name}</TableCell>
   180→                    <TableCell>
   181→                      <a href={`mailto:${booking.booker_email}`} className="text-blue-600 hover:underline">
   182→                        {booking.booker_email}
   183→                      </a>
   184→                    </TableCell>
   185→                    <TableCell>
   186→                      <Badge
   187→                        variant={booking.status === 'confirmed' ? 'default' : 'destructive'}
   188→                        className={
   189→                          booking.status === 'confirmed'
   190→                            ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800 hover:bg-green-100'
   191→                            : ''
   192→                        }
   193→                      >
   194→                        {booking.status}
   195→                      </Badge>
   196→                    </TableCell>
   197→                    <TableCell>
   198→                      {booking.meet_link ? (
   199→                        <Button
   200→                          variant="outline"
   201→                          size="sm"
   202→                          className="gap-1"
   203→                          onClick={() => window.open(booking.meet_link!, '_blank')}
   204→                        >
   205→                          <Video className="h-3 w-3" />
   206→                          Join
   207→                        </Button>
   208→                      ) : (
   209→                        <span className="text-gray-400 text-sm">—</span>
   210→                      )}
   211→                    </TableCell>
   212→                    <TableCell className="max-w-[200px] truncate" title={booking.notes || ''}>
   213→                      {booking.notes || <span className="text-gray-400">—</span>}
   214→                    </TableCell>
   215→                    <TableCell>
   216→                      {booking.opportunity?.name ? (
   217→                        <span className="text-sm">{booking.opportunity.company_name}</span>
   218→                      ) : (
   219→                        <span className="text-gray-400 text-sm">—</span>
   220→                      )}
   221→                    </TableCell>
   222→                    <TableCell>
   223→                      <DropdownMenu>
   224→                        <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
   225→                          <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
   226→                            <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
   227→                          </Button>
   228→                        </DropdownMenuTrigger>
   229→                        <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
   230→                          {booking.meet_link && (
   231→                            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => copyMeetLink(booking.meet_link!)}>
   232→                              <Copy className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   233→                              Copy Meet Link
   234→                            </DropdownMenuItem>
   235→                          )}
   236→                          {booking.status === 'confirmed' && (
   237→                            <DropdownMenuItem
   238→                              onClick={() => setCancelTarget(booking)}
   239→                              className="text-red-600 focus:text-red-600"
   240→                            >
   241→                              <XCircle className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   242→                              Cancel Meeting
   243→                            </DropdownMenuItem>
   244→                          )}
   245→                        </DropdownMenuContent>
   246→                      </DropdownMenu>
   247→                    </TableCell>
   248→                  </TableRow>
   249→                ))
   250→              )}
   251→            </TableBody>
   252→          </Table>
   253→        </CardContent>
   254→      </Card>
   255→
   256→      {/* Cancel Confirmation Dialog */}
   257→      <Dialog open={!!cancelTarget} onOpenChange={(open) => !open && setCancelTarget(null)}>
   258→        <DialogContent>
   259→          <DialogHeader>
   260→            <DialogTitle>Cancel Meeting</DialogTitle>
   261→            <DialogDescription>
   262→              Are you sure you want to cancel the meeting with{' '}
   263→              <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">{cancelTarget?.booker_name}</span> on{' '}
   264→              <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">
   265→                {cancelTarget ? formatDate(cancelTarget.meeting_date) : ''}
   266→              </span>
   267→              ? This action cannot be undone.
   268→            </DialogDescription>
   269→          </DialogHeader>
   270→          <DialogFooter>
   271→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setCancelTarget(null)} disabled={cancelling}>
   272→              Keep Meeting
   273→            </Button>
   274→            <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handleCancel} disabled={cancelling}>
   275→              {cancelling ? 'Cancelling...' : 'Cancel Meeting'}
   276→            </Button>
   277→          </DialogFooter>
   278→        </DialogContent>
   279→      </Dialog>
   280→    </div>
   281→  );
   282→}
   283→
